creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
Using gmirrors as swap on our hosts in the cluster and I noticed that I can no longer get a crashdump out of a system if its swap is gmirror based.

# gmirror status
        Name    Status  Components
mirror/swap0  COMPLETE  da0p2 (ACTIVE)
                        da1p2 (ACTIVE)
mirror/swap1  COMPLETE  da2p2 (ACTIVE)
                        da3p2 (ACTIVE)
mirror/swap2  COMPLETE  da5p2 (ACTIVE)
                        da6p2 (ACTIVE)
